How to Write a Perfect Love & Romance Card

30 real love & romance messages you can copy-paste today. 5 pro writing tips from our card editors. Bad-vs-good comparisons so you can spot the generic stuff and write something they'll actually remember.

📝 30 copy-paste messages 💡 5 writing tips ✅ Bad vs Good examples ❓ FAQs answered
Jump to: 30 Messages 5 Writing Tips Bad vs Good FAQ Pick a Love & Romance Template

1 30 Love & Romance Messages You Can Steal Today

Click 📋 Copy to save to clipboard. Click 🎴 Use on a card to open a love & romance template with this message ready to go.

01 ✍️ General
I love you. Three small words that mean everything to me. 💘💕
🎴 Use on a card
02 ✍️ General
You're the first thing I think of when I wake up and the last before I sleep. 💙💤
🎴 Use on a card
03 ✍️ General
I love you more than yesterday, less than tomorrow. Forever yours. 💞
🎴 Use on a card
04 ✍️ General
In a world full of people, my heart chose you. Always. I love you. ❤️🧭
🎴 Use on a card
05 ✍️ General
Every love song, every sunset, every perfect moment — it all reminds me of you. 🌅🎵
🎴 Use on a card
06 ✍️ General
I don't say it enough: I love you, completely and unconditionally. 💗
🎴 Use on a card
07 👩 For Her
I love you, my beautiful girl. You make everything magical. ✨💖
🎴 Use on a card
08 👩 For Her
To my girlfriend/wife/love: you are the 'why' behind everything I do. I love you. 💍💫
🎴 Use on a card
09 👩 For Her
I love you, baby. Every little thing about you drives me crazy in the best way. 💘
🎴 Use on a card
10 👩 For Her
You + me = forever. I love you. 💞💕
🎴 Use on a card
11 👩 For Her
To the most beautiful soul I know — I love you with all of me. 💗🌈
🎴 Use on a card
12 👩 For Her
My heart is yours, and always will be. I love you, sweetheart. 💙
🎴 Use on a card
13 👨 For Him
I love you, babe. From the silly faces to the late-night talks — every part of you. 💜
🎴 Use on a card
14 👨 For Him
You're my home. I love you, my man. 🏡❤️
🎴 Use on a card
15 👨 For Him
I love you, handsome. Every day with you is the best day. 💙☀️
🎴 Use on a card
16 👨 For Him
To my boyfriend/husband — I don't know what I'd do without you. I love you forever. 💖
🎴 Use on a card
17 👨 For Him
I love you more than coffee, and that's really saying something. ☕😘❤️
🎴 Use on a card
18 👨 For Him
You're my favourite adventure. I love you, babe. 🚀💞
🎴 Use on a card
19 👨👩👧 Family
Love you, Mom. Thank you for being my safe place. 💗🌷
🎴 Use on a card
20 👨👩👧 Family
To my Dad — you're my hero, always. Love you. 💙🦸
🎴 Use on a card
21 👨👩👧 Family
Love you, sister/brother. You're not just family, you're my best friend. 👫💛
🎴 Use on a card
22 👨👩👧 Family
To my grandma/grandpa — sending you all my love today and always. 👴👵💕
🎴 Use on a card
23 👨👩👧 Family
Family is where love begins and never ends. Love you all. 🏡❤️
🎴 Use on a card
24 👨👩👧 Family
You don't choose family, but I'd choose you a thousand times. Love you. 💖
🎴 Use on a card
25 👯 Friends
Love you, friend. Thanks for being my person through everything. 🧡🤗
🎴 Use on a card
26 👯 Friends
To my bestie: I love you like a sibling. Forever ride or die. 💜👯
🎴 Use on a card
27 👯 Friends
Love you, man. Thanks for putting up with my nonsense all these years. 😂💙
🎴 Use on a card
28 👯 Friends
You're my platonic soulmate and I love you. Don't tell anyone I said that. 😉💕
🎴 Use on a card
29 👯 Friends
Some friendships are forever. Ours is one of them. Love you. 💖✨
🎴 Use on a card
30 👯 Friends
Love you, friend. So grateful the universe brought us together. 🌌💛
🎴 Use on a card

2 5 Pro Tips for Writing Love & Romance Cards That Get Saved

After editing 10,000+ greeting cards, these are the 5 patterns that separate "nice" cards from "I kept this on my fridge for 3 years" cards.

  1. 💡 Say 'I love you' first, THEN explain why. The direct line matters.
  2. 💡 Name one extremely specific, non-obvious thing you adore about them.
  3. 💡 Use a private pet name only they understand.
  4. 💡 Avoid clichés (moon, stars, 'complete me') — be original.
  5. 💡 Tell them something you'd be embarrassed to say face-to-face.

3 Bad vs Good: Love & Romance Card Messages, Side by Side

The difference between a forgotten card and a remembered one is usually 2 specific sentences. Here's what that looks like in practice.

❌ Don't write this
I love you so much.
✅ Write this instead
I love the way you laugh at your own jokes 3 seconds before the punchline. I love you, every part of you.
❌ Don't write this
You complete me.
✅ Write this instead
You don't complete me — you make me want to be a better version of myself. And I love you for that.
❌ Don't write this
I miss you.
✅ Write this instead
I miss your terrible singing in the shower and the way you leave socks literally everywhere. Come home. 💛

4 Love & Romance Card Writing — FAQ

The questions we get asked 4–5 times a week about writing love & romance cards.

Is it okay to write a love card to a new partner?

Absolutely. Keep it sweet, not intense. "I really really like you" > "I can't live without you" for month 2.

How often should you write love notes?

Once every 2–3 months beats twice a day. Rarity = value. Tuesday randoms beat Valentine's pressure.

What if I'm bad at words?

Steal a line from their favourite song / a movie you watched together. Citing the source makes it cute, not cheating.

Public or private?

Private always. The most intimate lines should be for their eyes only. Save the short sweet one for Instagram.
